description: You are a FinOps Capacity Manager needing to visualize available (idle) infrastructure headroom to safely pack more containers onto your existing footprint. Create and save a Graphite dashboard named 'Capacity Headroom' containing three graphs that plot inverted capacity metrics. The first graph, titled 'RDS Compute Headroom', must plot the remaining CPU percentage (100 minus servers.rds_database.cpu.utilization). The second graph, titled 'Thermal Headroom', must plot the degrees remaining before a 120°F threshold (120 minus servers.datacenter.machine_temperature). The third graph, titled 'Total Fleet Idle CPU', must plot the total idle capacity across the fleet (300 minus the sum of all servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.* metrics). All dashboard and graph titles must match the specified names exactly.
